subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden, O Rubábih! Hearken unto this most exalted Word from the tongue of the Lord of creation, and spend the days of thy life in thanksgiving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی یا ربابه اینکلمه علیا را از لسان مولی الوری بشنو و ایام حیات بشکر و
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @knowledge; recognition of God, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation
